disclaimer: Satire only. Not affiliated with the U.S. Department of Defense or any branch. All characters are fictional chibi mascots.
safety_brief: Don't do dumb stuff. Sign here. Initial here.
Reflective belt at night. Red flags by day.
Cover on indoors. Feelings off until Specialist rank.
This is Heritage Muster for unit continuity — not a dating sim.
Do not eat crayons IRL. In-game Crayon Constitution is satire.
universal_tips: CIF still has my heart. And my original issue canteen.
MRE heater skills transfer directly to faster boot camp.
Someone lost a reflective belt. Nation in crisis.
Five minutes means an hour in Navy time — timers are honest here.
S-1 has questions about your manpower forecast.
Field day: mop bucket compatibility improves spawn odds.
Safety brief complete. You may now muster irresponsibly.
Emotional availability: same as my CIF turn-in window — technically exists.
Relationship status: PCSing emotionally. Geographically optional.
My therapist said find hobbies. I chose you and the gym at 0500.

universal: S-1 approved Heritage Quarters assignment. Paperwork in triplicate.
Assigning to barracks for unit continuity purposes.
Legacy Muster initiated. Nation holds breath.
army: Will share a mop bucket on field day for the right recruit.
AR 670-1 wrote this pairing. Still in appeals.
navy: Not ghosting — comms blackout during muster.
Liberty starts when the brow lowers. Muster starts now.
Underway schedule: chaotic. This pairing: slightly less.
marines: No crayons until recruit pins Specialist.
air_force: Strategic Nap Doctrine suspended for muster.
First date: anything with AC. This counts.
Beard waiver submitted. Pairing approved anyway.
space_force: Houston, we have a muster. Please don't make it awkward.
coast_guard: Not a real branch joke. Real muster though.
Semper Paratus — for lineage and SAR.
Orange hi-vis energy in the barracks.
national_guard: Sorry I missed your text — drill. Muster is on.
M-Day ready. Date night: subject to orders.
ocp: Generic camo coalition approves Heritage Quarters.
Allied Camo Battalion: muster slips incoming.

universal: Fresh Muster hatched from a regulation duffel.
Recruit chibi deployed. Boot camp timer starts.
New bloodline entry logged. S-1 exhausted.
army: Another beautiful mistake joins Big Green.
marines: Devil Pup reporting for crayon inspection.
Every Marine a rifleman. This one is a squeaker.
navy: New shipmate can't make a rack yet. Give it time.
Starboard side recruit. Port side attitude.
Galley coffee energy: undrinkable. Recruit: adorable.
air_force: Chair Patrol cadet needs AC immediately.
ocp: ACC recruit mustered. Reflective belt pending.
Fresh camo blob joins the coalition.

universal: KP duty complete. Muster slips acquired legally-ish.
CQ log signed. You're free to muster again.
army: DFAC survived. Slips taste like institutional eggs.
Field day mop certified. Slips earned.
navy: Galley watch over. Wi-Fi still down. Slips anyway.
Port call in 5 minutes (1 hour). Slips collected.
marines: Field day motivated. Slips acquired with intensity.
MCMAP not required for KP. Slips still earned.

premium_cta: Branch Pack — $2.99 unlocks your parody faction skin + 50 field-manual quips. Enable itch demo preview to try all branches.

universal: Deployment orders cut. Battalion reset. Bloodline carries forward.
PCS complete. Two Privates and a dream remain.
Safety brief mandatory. Then we do it all again.
S-1 archived your roster. Heritage trait filed at 50% strength.
ready: Lineage deep enough. Commander approves deployment prestige.
Manpower forecast satisfied. Deploy when ready.
